holdings.infoBox: FTCS is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 2.81%, Monster Beverage at 2.42%, T. Rowe Price Group at 2.27%, Automatic Data Processing at 2.26%, and Paychex at 2.19%.

overview.description: The First Trust Capital Strength ETF (FTCS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ Capital Strength index. The fund tracks an equally weighted US large-cap equity index targeting companies with a strong cash balance, low long-term debt, and high return on equity. FTCS was launched on Jul 6, 2006 and is issued by First Trust.
